def reply_completed(self):
    ...
    kwargs["main_model"] = editor_model
    kwargs["edit_format"] = self.main_model.editor_edit_format
    kwargs["suggest_shell_commands"] = False
    ...
    editor_coder = Coder.create(**new_kwargs)
    editor_coder.run(with_message=content, preproc=False)

README / docs

ls /path/to/aider/aider/coders/__init__.py
grep -c 'def cmd_' /path/to/aider/aider/commands.py
test ! -e /path/to/aider/aider/plugin.json && echo 'still no manifest'

코퍼스 — 011_plugin-system/11_ai_plugin.md (심화)

Aider Plugin System

분석 스냅샷: 110_aider/ — extension via in-tree Commands slash handlers and Coder.create edit-format factory; no plugin.json, marketplace, or dynamic plugin loader.

Aider's "plugin system" is really two cooperating registries inside the Python package:

  1. Commands — user-facing /slash commands discovered by naming convention (cmd_* methods).
  2. aider.coders — edit-format "plugins" (subclasses of Coder) selected by Coder.create(edit_format=...).

There is no third-party plugin ABI comparable to Codex's .codex-plugin/plugin.json, Claude Code hooks, or SKILL.md packs. Extending Aider for end users means editing source, maintaining a fork, or wrapping the CLI externally.

Executive summary

Extension surface Mechanism Dynamic load?
Slash commands Commands.cmd_* → /name No — static class methods
Edit formats Coder subclasses in coders/__init__.py No — import-time registry
Chat modes /chat-mode, /architect, etc. → SwitchCoder Switches coder class at runtime
Config .aider.conf.yml, env, CLI (args.py) Not plugin bundles
GUI aider/gui.py Streamlit front-end Separate entry, same coders
MCP / hooks N/A Absent

Negative evidence — no plugin manifest

Corpus audit for plugin.json, .codex-plugin, dynamic importlib plugin discovery, or marketplace install under 110_aider/aider/ returns no application-level plugin loader.

Grep for plugin.json in 110_aider/ hits only unrelated strings (pytest plugins: headers in test fixtures, NeoVim plugin docs in HISTORY.md). No manifest file format exists in core.

Dependencies in 110_aider/pyproject.toml:1-49 declare a single package aider with scripts entry aider = "aider.main:main" — one console script, not a plugin host.

Architecture

graph TD
    A["main.py"] --> B["Commands(io, coder)"]
    A --> C["Coder.create(edit_format)"]
    C --> D["coders.__all__ scan<br/>__init__.py:18-34"]
    D --> E["EditBlockCoder<br/>WholeFileCoder<br/>ArchitectCoder ..."]
    B --> F["Commands.run(inp)"]
    F --> G{"starts with / or !?"}
    G -->|/cmd| H["do_run → cmd_*"]
    G -->|!| I["do_run('run', ...)"]
    H --> J["SwitchCoder exception<br/>mode / model switch"]
    H --> K["Side effects:<br/>web, lint, git"]
    E --> L["get_edits / apply_edits<br/>format-specific"]

Runtime "plugins" are classes already imported at startup — not DLL-style modules loaded from disk.

Commands class — slash-command registry

Construction and cloning

110_aider/aider/commands.py:36-85 defines Commands:

class Commands:
    voice = None
    scraper = None

    def clone(self):
        return Commands(
            self.io,
            None,
            voice_language=self.voice_language,
            ...
        )

    def __init__(self, io, coder, ...):
        self.io = io
        self.coder = coder
        ...

When switching coders via SwitchCoder, Coder.create(from_coder=...) copies commands=from_coder.commands.clone() (base_coder.py:177) so slash handlers persist across edit-format changes.

Convention-based registration

The authoritative comment at commands.py:334-335:

# any method called cmd_xxx becomes a command automatically.
# each one must take an args param.

Discovery is reflection over dir(self):

# commands.py:276-285
def get_commands(self):
    commands = []
    for attr in dir(self):
        if not attr.startswith("cmd_"):
            continue
        cmd = attr[4:]
        cmd = cmd.replace("_", "-")
        commands.append("/" + cmd)
    return commands

Examples mapped:

Method Slash command Docstring summary
cmd_run /run Run shell, optional chat injection (1013-1053)
cmd_web /web Scrape URL to markdown (219-253)
cmd_architect /architect Switch to architect mode (1190-1192)
cmd_lint /lint Lint and optionally fix (356-409)
cmd_model /model Switch main LLM (87-112)
cmd_chat_mode /chat-mode Switch edit format / mode (138-207)
cmd_help /help Interactive help via HelpCoder (1119-1144)

No registration table, no JSON manifest, no priority ordering beyond dir() iteration (sorted only when displayed in basic_help() at 1104-1115).

Dispatch pipeline

commands.py:312-332 — run(inp):

def run(self, inp):
    if inp.startswith("!"):
        self.coder.event("command_run")
        return self.do_run("run", inp[1:])

    res = self.matching_commands(inp)
    ...
    return self.do_run(command, rest_inp)

do_run() at 287-298 resolves cmd_{name} via getattr and invokes with args string.

Completion hooks: optional completions_{cmd} and completions_raw_{cmd} methods (266-274, 258-264).

SwitchCoder — runtime mode switch without plugins

Model and mode changes raise SwitchCoder (commands.py:30-33):

class SwitchCoder(Exception):
    def __init__(self, placeholder=None, **kwargs):
        self.kwargs = kwargs
        self.placeholder = placeholder

Example — /model at commands.py:96-112:

model = models.Model(model_name, ...)
models.sanity_check_models(self.io, model)
raise SwitchCoder(main_model=model, edit_format=new_edit_format)

main.py catches this exception and re-creates the coder via Coder.create(**kwargs) — a factory swap, not loading a new plugin module.

/chat-mode — enumerates coder registry

cmd_chat_mode at commands.py:138-207 imports aider.coders and builds valid formats from coders.__all__:

valid_formats = OrderedDict(
    sorted(
        (
            coder.edit_format,
            coder.__doc__.strip().split("\n")[0] if coder.__doc__ else "No description",
        )
        for coder in coders.__all__
        if getattr(coder, "edit_format", None)
    )
)

Built-in aliases (help, ask, code, architect, context) map to edit formats or special coders before raising SwitchCoder.

This is the user-facing "plugin picker" — but every option is compiled into the package.

Help command spawns another coder

cmd_help at 1137-1144 demonstrates nested factory use:

coder = Coder.create(
    io=self.io,
    from_coder=self.coder,
    edit_format="help",
    summarize_from_coder=False,
    map_tokens=512,
    map_mul_no_files=1,
)

HelpCoder is just another entry in __all__ — not a downloaded plugin.

Coder.create — edit-format factory

Classmethod signature and selection loop

110_aider/aider/coders/base_coder.py:124-201:

@classmethod
def create(
    self,
    main_model=None,
    edit_format=None,
    io=None,
    from_coder=None,
    summarize_from_coder=True,
    **kwargs,
):
    import aider.coders as coders
    ...
    for coder in coders.__all__:
        if hasattr(coder, "edit_format") and coder.edit_format == edit_format:
            res = coder(main_model, io, **kwargs)
            res.original_kwargs = dict(kwargs)
            return res

    valid_formats = [...]
    raise UnknownEditFormat(edit_format, valid_formats)

Selection algorithm:

  1. Resolve edit_format from argument, from_coder, or main_model.edit_format (142-148).
  2. If switching coders, merge kwargs from from_coder.original_kwargs and optionally summarize chat history on format change (153-188).
  3. Linear scan coders.__all__ for matching edit_format class attribute.
  4. Instantiate matching subclass: coder(main_model, io, **kwargs).
  5. Store original_kwargs on instance for future switches.

clone() at 203-205 delegates to Coder.create(from_coder=self, **kwargs).

Default class attributes

base_coder.py:117-118:

suggest_shell_commands = True
detect_urls = True

Subclasses override edit_format, gpt_prompts, and behavior hooks (get_edits, apply_edits, reply_completed).

Main entry wiring

110_aider/aider/main.py:973-1007:

coder = Coder.create(
    main_model=main_model,
    edit_format=args.edit_format,
    io=io,
    repo=repo,
    ...
    commands=commands,
    suggest_shell_commands=args.suggest_shell_commands,
    ...
)

The commands object is injected — typically constructed earlier in main() with shared io.

coders/__init__.py — exported coder list

Full registry at 110_aider/aider/coders/__init__.py:1-34:

from .architect_coder import ArchitectCoder
from .ask_coder import AskCoder
from .base_coder import Coder
from .context_coder import ContextCoder
from .editblock_coder import EditBlockCoder
from .editblock_fenced_coder import EditBlockFencedCoder
from .editor_diff_fenced_coder import EditorDiffFencedCoder
from .editor_editblock_coder import EditorEditBlockCoder
from .editor_whole_coder import EditorWholeFileCoder
from .help_coder import HelpCoder
from .patch_coder import PatchCoder
from .udiff_coder import UnifiedDiffCoder
from .udiff_simple import UnifiedDiffSimpleCoder
from .wholefile_coder import WholeFileCoder

__all__ = [
    HelpCoder,
    AskCoder,
    Coder,
    EditBlockCoder,
    EditBlockFencedCoder,
    WholeFileCoder,
    PatchCoder,
    UnifiedDiffCoder,
    UnifiedDiffSimpleCoder,
    ArchitectCoder,
    EditorEditBlockCoder,
    EditorWholeFileCoder,
    EditorDiffFencedCoder,
    ContextCoder,
]

Adding a new edit format requires:

  1. New module foo_coder.py subclassing Coder.
  2. Set class attr edit_format = "foo".
  3. Import + append to __all__.
  4. Optionally add prompts module and CLI docs.

No runtime discovery — missing step 3 means UnknownEditFormat at base_coder.py:201.

Edit format reference

Class edit_format Role
EditBlockCoder diff SEARCH/REPLACE blocks (editblock_coder.py:18)
WholeFileCoder whole Full file rewrites
UnifiedDiffCoder udiff Unified diff format
PatchCoder patch Patch application
ArchitectCoder architect Plan with architect model
AskCoder ask Q&A without edits
HelpCoder help Documentation assistant
ContextCoder context File identification
Editor*Coder various Second pass in architect flow

Commented-out SingleWholeFileFunctionCoder shows removed/experimental formats stay out of __all__ (__init__.py:16-17, 28).

Architect pattern — two-stage coder factory

110_aider/aider/coders/architect_coder.py:11-48 — not a plugin hook, but composition via factory:

def reply_completed(self):
    ...
    kwargs["main_model"] = editor_model
    kwargs["edit_format"] = self.main_model.editor_edit_format
    kwargs["suggest_shell_commands"] = False
    ...
    editor_coder = Coder.create(**new_kwargs)
    editor_coder.run(with_message=content, preproc=False)

The architect "plugin" is hard-coded: spawn editor coder from __all__, disable shell suggestions on editor pass (architect_coder.py:27).

Config vs plugins

110_aider/aider/args.py (referenced from commands.py:46) defines CLI flags — edit format, models, lint commands, analytics. .aider.conf.yml merges into args at startup.

Config can point to external linter shell commands but does not load Python extension modules. Contrast Codex plugin manifest declaring MCP servers and hook scripts.

GUI entry — parallel front-end

aider/gui.py (Streamlit) reuses Coder.create per website docs (aider/website/docs/scripting.md:72-95). Same coder registry, different IO wrapper — still no plugin.json.

Comparison — extension models

Feature Codex (co) Aider (ai)
Manifest .codex-plugin/plugin.json None
Hook events SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, etc. None
MCP from plugins plugins/manager.rs None
Slash commands N/A (TUI commands differ) Commands.cmd_*
Edit strategies Patches / tools Coder subclasses
Install Marketplace / path pip install aider-chat only
Third-party extend Plugin package Fork or external wrapper

How to extend Aider (developer guide from corpus)

Add a slash command

  1. Add def cmd_foo(self, args): with docstring to commands.py.
  2. /foo appears automatically via get_commands().
  3. Optionally add completions_foo() for tab completion.

Add an edit format

  1. Create aider/coders/myformat_coder.py:
    • class MyFormatCoder(Coder):
    • edit_format = "myformat"
    • Implement get_edits() / apply_edits().
  2. Register in coders/__init__.py imports and __all__.
  3. Document in website edit formats page.

What you cannot do without forking

  • Load .py plugins from user config path at runtime.
  • Register MCP tools from manifest.
  • Inject hooks before/after model calls (no hook bus).
  • Ship closed-source extensions without vendoring into aider package.

Evidence index

Claim Citation
Commands class aider/commands.py:36-85
cmd_* convention aider/commands.py:334-335
get_commands aider/commands.py:276-285
run / do_run aider/commands.py:287-332
SwitchCoder aider/commands.py:30-33, 87-112
cmd_chat_mode registry scan aider/commands.py:138-207
Coder.create factory aider/coders/base_coder.py:124-201
clone() aider/coders/base_coder.py:203-205
all list aider/coders/__init__.py:18-34
main Coder.create aider/main.py:973-1007
Architect nested create aider/coders/architect_coder.py:37-44
No plugin.json corpus grep — absent in aider/

Parity vs co

Concern co ai
Plugin manifest .codex-plugin/plugin.json None
Hooks SessionStart / UserPromptSubmit None
Extension install marketplace / path pip package only
Tool/coder plugins MCP + hooks In-tree coders + slash commands
Runtime switch Plugin manager reload SwitchCoder + Coder.create

See 011_plugin-system/11_co_plugin.md and 11_sp_plugin.md.

Related corpus docs

  • 011_plugin-system/11_co_plugin.md — Codex plugin.json and hooks
  • 009_mcp-orchestration/09_ai_mcp.md — no MCP (negative evidence)
  • 007_sandbox-exec-policy/07_ai_sandbox.md — shell policy
  • 003_tool-runtime/03_ai_tool.md — built-in capabilities

snapshot_to_current 델타

Area Snapshot Current
Commands In-tree cmd_* only New slash commands may appear per release
__all__ coders 14 classes listed Count/format names may grow
Plugin ABI None documented Community wrappers remain external
Architect two-pass ArchitectCoder + editor coders Pattern stable; flag names may shift

Re-verify with:

ls /path/to/aider/aider/coders/__init__.py
grep -c 'def cmd_' /path/to/aider/aider/commands.py
test ! -e /path/to/aider/aider/plugin.json && echo 'still no manifest'

변경 기록

날짜 변경
2026-06-27 Expanded to ≥12KB: Commands registry, Coder.create, all inventory, extension guide
2026-06-27 WP42: source citations + parity blocks
2026-06-27 WP27: initial ai axis doc
29

축 12: 가디언·승인

AXIS

012_guardian-approval/12_ai_guardian.md

기초 설명

Aider's safety model is human-in-the-loop confirmation via the IO layer. Shell runs, architect handoff, file additions, pip installs, gitignore prompts, URL ingestion, and lint/test recovery all call confirm_ask with varying strictness (explicit_yes_required, allow_never, ConfirmGroup). There is no autonomous guardian model, risk classifier, or policy DSL — only synchronous terminal or GUI prompts backed by InputOutput in 110_aider/aider/io.py.

이 문서에서 다루는 것

  • Approval Gates (summary)
  • confirm_ask full API (io.py:807-925)
  • Parameters
  • Response options (interactive)
  • Return value
  • Non-interactive bypass (self.yes)
  • Side effects
  • ConfirmGroup (io.py:82-88)
  • never_prompts
  • Related: offer_url (io.py:797-804)
  • Call sites by file
  • base_coder.py

소스 코드 스니펫

README / docs

@restore_multiline
def confirm_ask(
    self,
    question,
    default="y",
    subject=None,
    explicit_yes_required=False,
    group=None,
    allow_never=False,
) -> bool

README / docs

class ConfirmGroup:
    preference: str = None  # "all" | "skip" after first batch answer
    show_group: bool = True

    def __init__(self, items=None):
        if items is not None:
            self.show_group = len(items) > 1

README / docs

graph TD
    A["Risky action in Coder/Commands/Main"] --> B{"question_id in never_prompts?"}
    B -->|yes| Z["return False"]
    B -->|no| C{"self.yes set?"}
    C -->|True + explicit_yes_required| Z
    C -->|True + not explicit| Y["return True"]
    C -->|False| N["return False"]
    C -->|None| D["prompt_toolkit / input loop"]
    D --> E{"User response"}
    E -->|y or a| Y
    E -->|n| Z
    E -->|d + allow_never| F["never_prompts.add → False"]
    E -->|all/skip + group| G["set group.preference"]

코퍼스 — 012_guardian-approval/12_ai_guardian.md (심화)

Aider Guardian / Approval

분석 스냅샷: 110_aider/ — interactive io.confirm_ask() gates; no policy engine or guardian agent.

Aider's safety model is human-in-the-loop confirmation via the IO layer. Shell runs, architect handoff, file additions, pip installs, gitignore prompts, URL ingestion, and lint/test recovery all call confirm_ask with varying strictness (explicit_yes_required, allow_never, ConfirmGroup). There is no autonomous guardian model, risk classifier, or policy DSL — only synchronous terminal or GUI prompts backed by InputOutput in 110_aider/aider/io.py.

Approval Gates (summary)

Action Gate Strictness
Shell commands base_coder.handle_shell_commands explicit_yes_required=True, ConfirmGroup, allow_never
Shell output injection base_coder.run_shell_commands allow_never
Architect → editor ArchitectCoder.reply_completed plain yes/no
Add mentioned files base_coder.check_for_file_mentions ConfirmGroup, allow_never
Add URLs from chat base_coder.check_for_urls ConfirmGroup, allow_never
Create / edit unknown files base_coder.apply_updates subject = path
Context limit overrun base_coder.check_tokens proceed anyway
Lint / test recovery base_coder.reply_completed optional fix loop
/lint command commands.cmd_lint per-file fix
/add create file commands.cmd_add create missing file
/run output commands.run_cmd token-weighted add
Pip / extra install utils.check_pip_install_extra subject = shell command
Playwright install scrape.check_playwright default yes
Git repo init main.setup_git create repo in cwd
.gitignore patterns main.check_gitignore recommended patterns
Analytics opt-in main.main privacy prompt
Open URL io.offer_url allow_never

confirm_ask full API (io.py:807-925)

Signature and decorator:

@restore_multiline
def confirm_ask(
    self,
    question,
    default="y",
    subject=None,
    explicit_yes_required=False,
    group=None,
    allow_never=False,
) -> bool

Parameters

Param Type Default Behavior
question str required Prompt text; options suffix appended internally
default str "y" Empty input / EOF → this value; drives [Yes] / [No] hint
subject str | None None Bold context block printed before prompt; multiline subjects padded to max line width
explicit_yes_required bool False When self.yes is True (--yes-always), still returns False unless user types y; (A)ll disabled in group mode
group ConfirmGroup | None None Batch mode for multi-item loops; forces allow_never=True
allow_never bool False Adds (D)on't ask again; stores (question, subject) in never_prompts → future calls return False

Response options (interactive)

Base: (Y)es/(N)o. With group: /(A)ll (unless explicit_yes_required) and /(S)kip all. With allow_never: /(D)on't ask again.

Valid prefixes: yes, no, skip, all, don't (when allowed). First character drives outcome after lowercasing.

Return value

Returns True when user affirms. Affirmation means res == "y", or res in ("y", "a") when explicit_yes_required=False. (A)ll sets group.preference = "all"; (S)kip all sets "skip". (D)on't ask again adds to never_prompts and returns False.

Non-interactive bypass (self.yes)

InputOutput.__init__ stores CLI --yes-always as self.yes (io.py:308). Logic at 866-872:

  • self.yes is True → auto "y" unless explicit_yes_required (then auto "n")
  • self.yes is False → auto "n"
  • group.preference set → reuse without re-prompting

Pipe mode and GUI set this explicitly: main.py:546-547 forces yes_always=True when return_coder=True (GUI bootstrap); gui.py:77-79 constructs CaptureIO(..., yes=True, ...).

Side effects

Increments num_user_asks, may ring_bell(), appends blockquoted line to chat history, uses prompt_session.prompt or plain input, validates response in a loop with tool_error on bad input.

ConfirmGroup (io.py:82-88)

class ConfirmGroup:
    preference: str = None  # "all" | "skip" after first batch answer
    show_group: bool = True

    def __init__(self, items=None):
        if items is not None:
            self.show_group = len(items) > 1

When show_group is False (single item), group batch options are suppressed. Used for URL lists, file mentions, and shell command batches.

never_prompts

Set of (question, subject) tuples. Checked at start of confirm_ask and in offer_url. Persists for session lifetime only (not disk).

Related: offer_url (io.py:797-804)

Wraps confirm_ask(prompt, subject=url, allow_never=allow_never) then webbrowser.open(url) on True.

Call sites by file

base_coder.py

Line Question Flags / context
976-978 "Add URL to the chat?" subject=url, group, allow_never=True
1415 "Try to proceed anyway?" context limit exceeded
1604 "Attempt to fix lint errors?" after auto-lint in reply_completed
1620 "Attempt to fix test errors?" after test run
1772-1774 "Add file to the chat?" subject=rel_fname, ConfirmGroup(new_mentions), allow_never
2207 "Create new file?" subject=path before touch_file
2226-2229 "Allow edits to file that has not been added to the chat?" subject=path
2456-2462 "Run shell command?" / "Run shell commands?" subject=joined commands, explicit_yes_required=True, group, allow_never
2479-2481 "Add command output to the chat?" after shell execution, allow_never

Shell approval is the strictest gate: --yes-always does not auto-run commands because of explicit_yes_required=True.

architect_coder.py

Line Question Notes
17 "Edit the files?" Skipped when auto_accept_architect; gates handoff from architect model to editor model

Line Question Notes

Used for optional deps (Streamlit, Playwright deps, etc.) with warning text beforehand.

Line Caller Notes

Flow diagram

graph TD
    A["Risky action in Coder/Commands/Main"] --> B{"question_id in never_prompts?"}
    B -->|yes| Z["return False"]
    B -->|no| C{"self.yes set?"}
    C -->|True + explicit_yes_required| Z
    C -->|True + not explicit| Y["return True"]
    C -->|False| N["return False"]
    C -->|None| D["prompt_toolkit / input loop"]
    D --> E{"User response"}
    E -->|y or a| Y
    E -->|n| Z
    E -->|d + allow_never| F["never_prompts.add → False"]
    E -->|all/skip + group| G["set group.preference"]

Parity vs co

Concern co (12_co_guardian.md) ai (this doc)
Policy engine TOML rules + guardian subagent None
Approval UX structured guardian transcript + JSON assessment terminal (Y)es/(N)o (+ batch/group)
Auto-deny risk_score >= 80 fail-closed to user no scoring; user says no
Auto-approve guardian risk_score < 80 --yes-always except explicit_yes_required
Persistence session + config profiles in-memory never_prompts only
Action taxonomy 6 typed GuardianApprovalRequest variants ad hoc string questions per call site
Non-interactive approval policy enum self.yes tri-state + pipe/GUI defaults

Codex routes shell/patch/network/MCP through guardian review; Aider routes the same classes of work through ~20 distinct confirm_ask strings with no central registry.

Interactive prompt construction (detail)

When not bypassed by self.yes, confirm_ask builds the prompt string incrementally (io.py:831-846):

  1. Start with bare question.
  2. Append (Y)es/(N)o.
  3. If group active and not explicit_yes_required, append /(A)ll.
  4. If group active, append /(S)kip all (works even with explicit_yes_required — skip still available).
  5. If allow_never (forced True when group set), append /(D)on't ask again.
  6. Append default hint: [Yes], [No], or [{default}].

The subject block renders before the question line when present. Multiline subjects pad every line to the longest line width so block commands (shell batches) align in the terminal.

Input loop uses prefix matching: any(valid_response.startswith(res) for valid_response in valid_responses) so y, ye, yes all work. Invalid input prints Please answer with one of: … via tool_error and retries.

Chat history records blockquoted {question_stripped} {first_char} for auditability in --chat-history-file sessions.

--yes-always vs explicit_yes_required matrix

self.yes explicit_yes_required Result without user input
True False True (auto yes)
True True False (auto no — shell safety)
False any False
None any interactive prompt

Call sites using explicit_yes_required=True: only base_coder.handle_shell_commands (2456-2461). Every other gate respects --yes-always.

Onboarding and OAuth (adjacent, not in scope table)

onboarding.py:93-96 calls confirm_ask("Login to OpenRouter or create a free account?", default="y"). This is onboarding surface, not execution guardian, but uses the same API and respects self.yes. Documented for completeness; WP53 call-site list focuses on base_coder, commands, scrape, main, utils.

Test coverage pointers

tests/basic/test_io.py exercises explicit_yes_required, ConfirmGroup all/skip, allow_never, yes/no parsing. tests/basic/test_coder.py mocks confirm_ask for shell and architect flows. Tests confirm GUI/pipe behavior is simulated via self.yes, not separate code paths.

Boundary (explicit non-goals)

  • No autonomous guardian model or risk classifier
  • No policy DSL or TOML permission profiles
  • No structured approval request type or wire protocol
  • No fail-closed timeout path — missing stdin EOF uses default
  • never_prompts is session-scoped, not project-scoped

Approval is synchronous InputOutput only; GUI replaces IO on coder.commands.io but inherits the same confirm_ask implementation via CaptureIO(InputOutput).

  • 110_aider/aider/io.py:82-88 — ConfirmGroup

  • 110_aider/aider/commands.py:389,838,1029 — lint, add, run

Area Snapshot Current

30

축 13: 기타

AXIS

013_etc/13_ai_etc.md

기초 설명

Aider는 dimensions 01-12 (TUI, Prompt, Tool, Skill, Subagent, Surface, Sandbox, Config, MCP, Memory, Plugin, Guardian)에 포함되지 않는 고유한 교차 관심사들을 다수 보유하고 있다. 특히 Git/VCS 통합과 Coder 전략 다양성은 Aider를 다른 AI 코딩 에이전트와 차별화하는 핵심 강점이다.

이 문서에서 다루는 것

  • 개요
    1. Git/VCS 통합 (핵심 강점)
  • 1.1 아키텍처 개요
  • 1.2 GitRepo 클래스 (repo.py)
  • 1.3 RepoMap - Tree-sitter + PageRank (repomap.py)
  • 1.4 .aiderignore 시스템
    1. 모델 라우팅 / 프로바이더 추상화
  • 2.1 아키텍처
  • 2.2 LazyLiteLLM - 지연 로딩
  • 2.3 모델 별칭 시스템
  • 2.4 ModelSettings 데이터클래스
  • 2.5 3-모델 아키텍처

# repo.py - Attribution 핵심 로직
@contextlib.contextmanager
def set_git_env(var_name, value, original_value):
    """Temporarily set a Git environment variable."""
    os.environ[var_name] = value
    try:
        yield
    finally:
        if original_value is not None:
            os.environ[var_name] = original_value
        elif var_name in os.environ:
            del os.environ[var_name]

README / docs

# repo.py - get_commit_message()
def get_commit_message(self, diffs, context, user_language=None):
    diffs = "# Diffs:\n" + diffs
    content = ""
    if context:
        content += context + "\n"
    content += diffs

    system_content = self.commit_prompt or prompts.commit_system
    # 사용자 언어 설정 지원
    if user_language:
        language_instruction = f"\n- Is written in {user_language}."
    system_content = system_content.format(language_instruction=language_instruction)

    # 다중 모델 폴백: 토큰 한도 초과 시 다음 모델로
    for model in self.models:
        num_tokens = model.token_count(messages)
        max_tokens = model.info.get("max_input_tokens") or 0
        if max_tokens and num_tokens > max_tokens:
            continue
        commit_message = model.simple_send_with_retries(messages)
        if commit_message:
            break

README / docs

graph LR
    A[소스 파일들] -->|Tree-sitter 파싱| B[Tag 추출]
    B --> C["정의(def) 태그"]
    B --> D["참조(ref) 태그"]
    C --> E[NetworkX MultiDiGraph]
    D --> E
    E -->|PageRank| F[파일별 중요도 순위]
    F -->|이진 탐색| G[토큰 예산 내 코드 맵]
    G --> H[TreeContext 렌더링]
    H --> I[LLM 프롬프트에 삽입]

README / docs

# repomap.py - Tag = namedtuple("Tag", "rel_fname fname line name kind")
def get_tags_raw(self, fname, rel_fname):
    lang = filename_to_lang(fname)
    language = get_language(lang)
    parser = get_parser(lang)

    # Tree-sitter 쿼리 파일 (.scm) 로드
    query_scm = get_scm_fname(lang)
    code = self.io.read_text(fname)
    tree = parser.parse(bytes(code, "utf-8"))

    # 캡처 실행
    captures = self._run_captures(Query(language, query_scm), tree.root_node)

    for node, tag in all_nodes:
        if tag.startswith("name.definition."):
            kind = "def"
        elif tag.startswith("name.reference."):
            kind = "ref"
        yield Tag(rel_fname=rel_fname, fname=fname,
                  name=node.text.decode("utf-8"), kind=kind,
                  line=node.start_point[0])

    # ref가 없으면 Pygments로 백필
    if "ref" not in saw and "def" in saw:
        lexer = guess_lexer_for_filename(fname, code)
        tokens = [t[1] for t in lexer.get_tokens(code) if t[0] in Token.Name]
        for token in tokens:
            yield Tag(..., name=token, kind="ref", line=-1)

README / docs

# repomap.py - get_ranked_tags()
def get_ranked_tags(self, chat_fnames, other_fnames, mentioned_fnames, mentioned_idents):
    import networkx as nx

    G = nx.MultiDiGraph()
    personalize = 100 / len(fnames)

    # 가중치 계산 - 다중 휴리스틱
    for ident in idents:
        mul = 1.0
        if ident in mentioned_idents:    mul *= 10    # 대화에서 언급된 식별자
        is_snake = ("_" in ident)                      # snake_case
        is_camel = any(c.isupper() for c in ident)     # camelCase
        if (is_snake or is_camel) and len(ident) >= 8:
            mul *= 10                                   # 긴 의미있는 이름
        if ident.startswith("_"):  mul *= 0.1           # 프라이빗
        if len(defines[ident]) > 5: mul *= 0.1          # 너무 많은 정의 = 일반적

        for referencer, num_refs in Counter(references[ident]).items():
            for definer in definers:
                use_mul = mul
                if referencer in chat_rel_fnames:
                    use_mul *= 50  # 대화 중인 파일에서의 참조 = 매우 중요
                num_refs = math.sqrt(num_refs)  # 빈도 스케일 다운
                G.add_edge(referencer, definer, weight=use_mul * num_refs)

    # PageRank 실행
    ranked = nx.pagerank(G, weight="weight", personalization=personalization)

README / docs

# repomap.py - get_ranked_tags_map_uncached()
# 순위화된 태그를 이진 탐색으로 토큰 예산에 맞춤
middle = min(int(max_map_tokens // 25), num_tags)
while lower_bound <= upper_bound:
    tree = self.to_tree(ranked_tags[:middle], chat_rel_fnames)
    num_tokens = self.token_count(tree)
    pct_err = abs(num_tokens - max_map_tokens) / max_map_tokens
    if pct_err < 0.15:  # 15% 오차 허용
        break
    if num_tokens < max_map_tokens:
        lower_bound = middle + 1
    else:
        upper_bound = middle - 1
    middle = int((lower_bound + upper_bound) // 2)

README / docs

# repo.py - pathspec 기반 gitignore 호환 패턴 매칭
def refresh_aider_ignore(self):
    if not self.aider_ignore_file:
        return
    # 1초 미만 간격 체크 방지 (성능)
    current_time = time.time()
    if current_time - self.aider_ignore_last_check < 1:
        return
    # mtime 기반 변경 감지
    mtime = self.aider_ignore_file.stat().st_mtime
    if mtime != self.aider_ignore_ts:
        self.aider_ignore_ts = mtime
        self.ignore_file_cache = {}
        lines = self.aider_ignore_file.read_text().splitlines()
        self.aider_ignore_spec = pathspec.PathSpec.from_lines(
            pathspec.patterns.GitWildMatchPattern, lines)

README / docs

# llm.py - litellm import가 1.5초 걸리므로 지연 로딩
class LazyLiteLLM:
    _lazy_module = None

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        if name == "_lazy_module":
            return super()
        self._load_litellm()
        return getattr(self._lazy_module, name)

    def _load_litellm(self):
        if self._lazy_module is not None:
            return
        self._lazy_module = importlib.import_module("litellm")
        self._lazy_module.suppress_debug_info = True
        self._lazy_module.set_verbose = False
        self._lazy_module.drop_params = True

README / docs

@dataclass
class ModelSettings:
    name: str
    edit_format: str = "whole"           # 편집 전략
    weak_model_name: Optional[str] = None  # 가벼운 작업용 모델
    use_repo_map: bool = False             # 코드 맵 사용 여부
    send_undo_reply: bool = False
    lazy: bool = False                     # "게으름" 경고
    overeager: bool = False                # "과잉 편집" 경고
    reminder: str = "user"                 # 리마인더 위치
    examples_as_sys_msg: bool = False      # 예제를 시스템 메시지로
    cache_control: bool = False            # 프롬프트 캐싱
    streaming: bool = True
    editor_model_name: Optional[str] = None  # architect용 에디터
    editor_edit_format: Optional[str] = None
    reasoning_tag: Optional[str] = None      # thinking 태그
    system_prompt_prefix: Optional[str] = None
    accepts_settings: Optional[list] = None  # thinking_tokens, reasoning_effort

README / docs

def apply_generic_model_settings(self, model):
    if "/o3-mini" in model:
        self.edit_format = "diff"
        self.use_repo_map = True
        self.use_temperature = False
    elif "deepseek" in model and ("r1" in model or "reasoning" in model):
        self.edit_format = "diff"
        self.reasoning_tag = "think"
    elif "qwen3" in model and "235b" in model:
        self.edit_format = "diff"
        self.system_prompt_prefix = "/no_think"
        self.use_temperature = 0.7
        self.extra_params = {"top_p": 0.8, "top_k": 20}

README / docs

graph LR
    A[모델 정보 요청] --> B{로컬 메타데이터?}
    B -->|Yes| C[반환]
    B -->|No| D{LiteLLM JSON 캐시?}
    D -->|Yes| E[반환]
    D -->|No| F{LiteLLM 라이브러리?}
    F -->|Yes| G[반환]
    F -->|No| H{OpenRouter 캐시?}
    H -->|Yes| I[반환]
    H -->|No| J[OpenRouter 웹 스크래핑]

README / docs

EXCEPTIONS = [
    ExInfo("APIConnectionError", retry=True, description=None),
    ExInfo("AuthenticationError", retry=False,
           description="The API provider is not able to authenticate you."),
    ExInfo("BadGatewayError", retry=True,
           description="The API provider's servers are down or overloaded."),
    ExInfo("ContextWindowExceededError", retry=False, description=None),  # 특수 처리
    ExInfo("RateLimitError", retry=True,
           description="The API provider has rate limited you."),
    ExInfo("Timeout", retry=True,
           description="The API provider timed out."),
    # ... 총 20+ 예외 유형
]

README / docs

def get_ex_info(self, ex):
    # boto3 미설치 시 명확한 안내
    if ex.__class__ is litellm.APIConnectionError:
        if "boto3" in str(ex):
            return ExInfo("APIConnectionError", False, "You need to: pip install boto3")
    # 크레딧 부족 시 재시도 안 함
    if ex.__class__ is litellm.APIError:
        if "insufficient credits" in str(ex).lower() and '"code":402' in str(ex).lower():
            return ExInfo("APIError", False, "Insufficient credits.")

README / docs

# base_coder.py - send_message() 내부
retry_delay = 0.125

while True:
    try:
        yield from self.send(messages, functions=self.functions)
        break
    except litellm_ex.exceptions_tuple() as err:
        ex_info = litellm_ex.get_ex_info(err)

        if ex_info.name == "ContextWindowExceededError":
            exhausted = True  # 특수 처리: 컨텍스트 축소 시도
            break

        should_retry = ex_info.retry
        if should_retry:
            retry_delay *= 2  # 지수 백오프
            if retry_delay > RETRY_TIMEOUT:  # 60초 타임아웃
                should_retry = False

        if not should_retry:
            self.check_and_open_urls(err, ex_info.description)
            break

        self.io.tool_output(f"Retrying in {retry_delay:.1f} seconds...")
        time.sleep(retry_delay)

README / docs

except FinishReasonLength:
    # 출력 제한 도달 시, assistant_prefill 지원 모델은 계속 생성
    if not self.main_model.info.get("supports_assistant_prefill"):
        exhausted = True
        break

    self.multi_response_content = self.get_multi_response_content_in_progress()
    # 이전 응답을 assistant 메시지로 추가하여 이어서 생성
    messages.append(
        dict(role="assistant", content=self.multi_response_content, prefix=True)
    )

README / docs

# io.py - 에디터 파일 락 대응
def write_text(self, filename, content):
    # 파일이 잠겨있을 때 progressive backoff로 재시도
    delay = 0.1
    while True:
        try:
            # 쓰기 시도
            ...
        except OSError:
            delay *= 2  # Exponential backoff

README / docs

ANY_GIT_ERROR = [
    git.exc.ODBError, git.exc.GitError,
    git.exc.InvalidGitRepositoryError, git.exc.GitCommandNotFound,
    OSError, IndexError, BufferError, TypeError,
    ValueError, AttributeError, AssertionError, TimeoutError,
]
# 모든 Git 작업이 이 튜플로 감싸져 graceful degradation

def event(self, event_name, main_model=None, **kwargs):
    properties = {}
    if main_model:
        properties["main_model"] = self._redact_model_name(main_model)
        properties["weak_model"] = self._redact_model_name(main_model.weak_model)
        properties["editor_model"] = self._redact_model_name(main_model.editor_model)

    if self.ph:  # PostHog
        self.ph.capture(event_name, distinct_id=self.user_id, properties=properties)

    if self.logfile:  # 로컬 로그
        log_entry = {"event": event_name, "properties": properties,
                     "user_id": self.user_id, "time": int(time.time())}
        with open(self.logfile, "a") as f:
            json.dump(log_entry, f)

README / docs

]

def try_to_select_default_model():
    # 우선순위 기반 자동 선택
    model_key_pairs = [
        ("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "sonnet"),
        ("DEEPSEEK_API_KEY", "deepseek"),
        ("OPENAI_API_KEY", "gpt-4o"),
        ("GEMINI_API_KEY", "gemini/gemini-2.5-pro-exp-03-25"),
        ("VERTEXAI_PROJECT", "vertex_ai/gemini-2.5-pro-exp-03-25"),
    ]
    for env_key, model_name in model_key_pairs:
        if os.environ.get(env_key):
            return model_name

# onboarding.py - 브라우저 기반 OAuth
def generate_pkce_codes():
    code_verifier = secrets.token_urlsafe(64)
    hasher = hashlib.sha256()
    hasher.update(code_verifier.encode("utf-8"))
    code_challenge = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(hasher.digest()).rstrip(b"=").decode("utf-8")
    return code_verifier, code_challenge

def exchange_code_for_key(code, code_verifier, io):
    response = requests.post(
        "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/auth/keys",
        json={"code": code, "code_verifier": code_verifier,
              "code_challenge_method": "S256"},
        timeout=30)
    return response.json().get("key")

README / docs

def check_openrouter_tier(api_key):
    """무료/유료 티어에 따라 다른 기본 모델 선택"""
    response = requests.get("https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/auth/key",
                           headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {api_key}"})
    is_free_tier = response.json().get("data", {}).get("is_free_tier", True)
    # 무료: deepseek-r1:free, 유료: claude-sonnet-4

class Voice:
    threshold = 0.15  # 볼륨 감지 임계값

    def record_and_transcribe(self, history=None, language=None):
        # sounddevice로 실시간 녹음
        with self.sd.InputStream(samplerate=sample_rate, channels=1,
                                  callback=self.callback, device=self.device_id):
            prompt(self.get_prompt, refresh_interval=0.1)  # 실시간 볼륨 바 표시

        # Whisper로 전사
        transcript = litellm.transcription(
            model="whisper-1", file=fh,
            prompt=history,    # 이전 대화 컨텍스트
            language=language  # 언어 힌트
        )

README / docs

def get_images_message(self, fnames):
    supports_images = self.main_model.info.get("supports_vision")
    supports_pdfs = self.main_model.info.get("supports_pdf_input")

    for fname in fnames:
        mime_type, _ = mimetypes.guess_type(fname)
        with open(fname, "rb") as image_file:
            encoded_string = base64.b64encode(image_file.read()).decode("utf-8")

        if mime_type.startswith("image/") and supports_images:
            image_messages += [
                {"type": "text", "text": f"Image file: {rel_fname}"},
                {"type": "image_url", "image_url": {"url": image_url, "detail": "high"}},
            ]
        elif mime_type == "application/pdf" and supports_pdfs:
            image_messages += [
                {"type": "text", "text": f"PDF file: {rel_fname}"},
                {"type": "image_url", "image_url": image_url},
            ]

class EditBlockCoder(Coder):
    edit_format = "diff"

    def apply_edits(self, edits, dry_run=False):
        for path, original, updated in edits:
            full_path = self.abs_root_path(path)
            content = self.io.read_text(full_path)
            new_content = do_replace(full_path, content, original, updated, self.fence)

            # 실패 시 다른 채팅 파일에서 매칭 시도
            if not new_content and original.strip():
                for full_path in self.abs_fnames:
                    content = self.io.read_text(full_path)
                    new_content = do_replace(full_path, content, original, updated, self.fence)
                    if new_content:
                        path = self.get_rel_fname(full_path)
                        break

Baz           # 이전 줄과 동일

class ActionType(str, Enum):
    ADD = "Add"
    DELETE = "Delete"
    UPDATE = "Update"

@dataclass
class PatchAction:
    type: ActionType
    path: str
    new_content: Optional[str] = None  # ADD용
    chunks: List[Chunk] = ...          # UPDATE용
    move_path: Optional[str] = None    # 파일 이동

# 3단계 퍼지 매칭
def find_context_core(lines, context, start):
    # 1. 정확 매칭 (fuzz=0)
    # 2. rstrip 매칭 (fuzz=1) - 후행 공백 무시
    # 3. strip 매칭 (fuzz=100) - 모든 공백 무시

README / docs

class ArchitectCoder(AskCoder):
    edit_format = "architect"

    def reply_completed(self):
        content = self.partial_response_content

        # 1단계: 설계 모델이 변경 사항 기술
        if not self.auto_accept_architect and not self.io.confirm_ask("Edit the files?"):
            return

        # 2단계: 에디터 모델이 실제 편집 수행
        editor_model = self.main_model.editor_model or self.main_model
        kwargs = {
            "main_model": editor_model,
            "edit_format": self.main_model.editor_edit_format,
            "suggest_shell_commands": False,
            "map_tokens": 0,
            "cache_prompts": False,
        }

        editor_coder = Coder.create(io=self.io, from_coder=self, **kwargs)
        editor_coder.run(with_message=content, preproc=False)

README / docs

사용자 요청 → [Architect 모델: 자연어 변경 기술] → 사용자 확인 →
[Editor 모델: 실제 코드 편집] → 자동 커밋

README / docs

class ContextCoder(Coder):
    """파일 편집 없이, 어떤 파일이 편집 대상인지만 식별"""
    edit_format = "context"

    def reply_completed(self):
        # LLM이 언급한 파일과 현재 파일 비교
        current_rel_fnames = set(self.get_inchat_relative_files())
        mentioned_rel_fnames = set(self.get_file_mentions(content))

        if mentioned_rel_fnames == current_rel_fnames:
            return True  # 일치하면 완료

        # 일치하지 않으면 파일 교체 후 재시도
        self.abs_fnames = set()
        for fname in mentioned_rel_fnames:
            self.add_rel_fname(fname)
        self.reflected_message = self.gpt_prompts.try_again

README / docs

# base_coder.py - 최대 3회 반복
max_reflections = 3

# 편집 적용 후:
# 1. Lint 에러 → reflected_message로 재시도
# 2. 테스트 에러 → reflected_message로 재시도
# 3. 편집 실패 → 에러 메시지를 LLM에 피드백

graph TD
    A[편집 완료] --> B{auto_lint 활성?}
    B -->|Yes| C[변경된 파일 lint]
    C --> D{Python?}
    D -->|Yes| E[basic_lint + compile + flake8]
    D -->|No| F{커스텀 명령?}
    F -->|Yes| G[사용자 lint 명령 실행]
    F -->|No| H[Tree-sitter 기본 lint]

    E --> I{에러?}
    G --> I
    H --> I
    I -->|Yes| J[사용자에게 수정 제안]
    J -->|수락| K[LLM에 에러 전달하여 재시도]
    I -->|No| L[자동 커밋]

def py_lint(self, fname, rel_fname, code):
    basic_res = basic_lint(rel_fname, code)       # Tree-sitter 기본 검사
    compile_res = lint_python_compile(fname, code) # compile() 구문 검사
    flake_res = self.flake8_lint(rel_fname)        # flake8 치명적 에러만
    # E9, F821, F823, F831, F406, F407, F701, F702, F704, F706

README / docs

# base_coder.py - send_message 후 처리
if edited and self.auto_lint:
    lint_errors = self.lint_edited(edited)
    self.auto_commit(edited, context="Ran the linter")
    self.lint_outcome = not lint_errors
    if lint_errors:
        ok = self.io.confirm_ask("Attempt to fix lint errors?")
        if ok:
            self.reflected_message = lint_errors  # LLM에 피드백
            return  # 재시도 루프로

if edited and self.auto_test:
    test_errors = self.commands.cmd_test(self.test_cmd)
    self.test_outcome = not test_errors
    if test_errors:
        ok = self.io.confirm_ask("Attempt to fix test errors?")
        if ok:
            self.reflected_message = test_errors
            return

graph LR
    A[Aider] --> B[litellm - LLM 추상화]
    A --> C[GitPython - Git 통합]
    A --> D[tree-sitter - 코드 파싱]
    A --> E[networkx - PageRank]
    A --> F[grep-ast - TreeContext]
    A --> G[pathspec - gitignore 매칭]
    A --> H[diskcache - SQLite 캐시]
    A --> I[posthog - 텔레메트리]
    A --> J[sounddevice/pydub - 음성]
    A --> K[watchfiles - 파일 감시]
    A --> L[streamlit - GUI]

    A --> N[rich - 터미널 출력]
    A --> O[PIL - 이미지 처리]

코퍼스 — 013_etc/13_ai_etc.md (심화)

Aider 잔여 교차 관심사 분석

개요

Aider는 dimensions 01-12 (TUI, Prompt, Tool, Skill, Subagent, Surface, Sandbox, Config, MCP, Memory, Plugin, Guardian)에 포함되지 않는 고유한 교차 관심사들을 다수 보유하고 있다. 특히 Git/VCS 통합과 Coder 전략 다양성은 Aider를 다른 AI 코딩 에이전트와 차별화하는 핵심 강점이다.

분석 대상 소스: 110_aider/110_aider/

핵심 파일 맵:
├── repo.py          # Git 통합 핵심
├── repomap.py       # Tree-sitter + PageRank 코드 맵
├── models.py        # 모델 라우팅/프로바이더 추상화
├── llm.py           # LiteLLM 지연 로딩
├── exceptions.py    # 에러 분류 체계
├── analytics.py     # PostHog 텔레메트리
├── voice.py         # 음성 입력
├── linter.py        # Lint 통합
├── onboarding.py    # API 키 온보딩/OAuth
├── sendchat.py      # 메시지 유효성 검증
├── coders/          # 10+ 편집 전략 구현
│   ├── base_coder.py
│   ├── architect_coder.py
│   ├── editblock_coder.py
│   ├── patch_coder.py
│   ├── udiff_coder.py
│   ├── wholefile_coder.py
│   └── ...
└── benchmark/       # Exercism 벤치마크 스위트

1. Git/VCS 통합 (핵심 강점)

1.1 아키텍처 개요

Aider의 Git 통합은 단순한 버전 관리를 넘어, AI 편집의 attribution(귀속), 자동 커밋, diff 기반 컨텍스트 생성, 코드 맵 구축까지 포괄하는 포괄적 시스템이다.

graph TD
    A[GitRepo - repo.py] --> B[자동 커밋]
    A --> C[Diff 생성]
    A --> D[파일 추적]
    A --> E[.aiderignore]

    F[RepoMap - repomap.py] --> G[Tree-sitter 태그 추출]
    F --> H[NetworkX PageRank]
    F --> I[TreeContext 렌더링]

    B --> J[Attribution 로직]
    J --> K[Author/Committer 이름 변경]
    J --> L[Co-authored-by 트레일러]

    C --> M[LLM 커밋 메시지 생성]

    G --> N[def/ref 태그]
    N --> H
    H --> O[파일별 중요도 순위]
    O --> I
    I --> P[토큰 예산 내 코드 맵]

1.2 GitRepo 클래스 (repo.py)

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/repo.py

핵심 기능:

  • 다중 Git 에러 처리: ANY_GIT_ERROR 튜플로 git.exc.* 외에 OSError, IndexError, BufferError, TypeError 등 10가지 이상의 에러를 포괄적으로 처리
  • 환경변수 기반 Attribution: GIT_COMMITTER_NAME, GIT_AUTHOR_NAME 환경변수를 context manager로 안전하게 설정/복원
# repo.py - Attribution 핵심 로직
@contextlib.contextmanager
def set_git_env(var_name, value, original_value):
    """Temporarily set a Git environment variable."""
    os.environ[var_name] = value
    try:
        yield
    finally:
        if original_value is not None:
            os.environ[var_name] = original_value
        elif var_name in os.environ:
            del os.environ[var_name]

Attribution 시나리오 매트릭스

시나리오 aider_edits co_authored_by Author Committer 트레일러
AI 편집 (기본) True False You(aider) You(aider) 없음
AI + Co-authored-by True True You You 있음
사용자 커밋 (기본) False - You You(aider) 없음
사용자 + no-committer False False(명시) You You 없음

LLM 기반 커밋 메시지 생성

# repo.py - get_commit_message()
def get_commit_message(self, diffs, context, user_language=None):
    diffs = "# Diffs:\n" + diffs
    content = ""
    if context:
        content += context + "\n"
    content += diffs

    system_content = self.commit_prompt or prompts.commit_system
    # 사용자 언어 설정 지원
    if user_language:
        language_instruction = f"\n- Is written in {user_language}."
    system_content = system_content.format(language_instruction=language_instruction)

    # 다중 모델 폴백: 토큰 한도 초과 시 다음 모델로
    for model in self.models:
        num_tokens = model.token_count(messages)
        max_tokens = model.info.get("max_input_tokens") or 0
        if max_tokens and num_tokens > max_tokens:
            continue
        commit_message = model.simple_send_with_retries(messages)
        if commit_message:
            break

1.3 RepoMap - Tree-sitter + PageRank (repomap.py)

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/repomap.py

이것이 Aider의 가장 혁신적인 기술이다. 전체 코드베이스에서 현재 대화와 관련된 코드 조각만 선별하여 LLM 컨텍스트에 포함시킨다.

graph LR
    A[소스 파일들] -->|Tree-sitter 파싱| B[Tag 추출]
    B --> C["정의(def) 태그"]
    B --> D["참조(ref) 태그"]
    C --> E[NetworkX MultiDiGraph]
    D --> E
    E -->|PageRank| F[파일별 중요도 순위]
    F -->|이진 탐색| G[토큰 예산 내 코드 맵]
    G --> H[TreeContext 렌더링]
    H --> I[LLM 프롬프트에 삽입]

Tag 추출 과정

# repomap.py - Tag = namedtuple("Tag", "rel_fname fname line name kind")
def get_tags_raw(self, fname, rel_fname):
    lang = filename_to_lang(fname)
    language = get_language(lang)
    parser = get_parser(lang)

    # Tree-sitter 쿼리 파일 (.scm) 로드
    query_scm = get_scm_fname(lang)
    code = self.io.read_text(fname)
    tree = parser.parse(bytes(code, "utf-8"))

    # 캡처 실행
    captures = self._run_captures(Query(language, query_scm), tree.root_node)

    for node, tag in all_nodes:
        if tag.startswith("name.definition."):
            kind = "def"
        elif tag.startswith("name.reference."):
            kind = "ref"
        yield Tag(rel_fname=rel_fname, fname=fname,
                  name=node.text.decode("utf-8"), kind=kind,
                  line=node.start_point[0])

    # ref가 없으면 Pygments로 백필
    if "ref" not in saw and "def" in saw:
        lexer = guess_lexer_for_filename(fname, code)
        tokens = [t[1] for t in lexer.get_tokens(code) if t[0] in Token.Name]
        for token in tokens:
            yield Tag(..., name=token, kind="ref", line=-1)

지원 언어 (tree-sitter-language-pack): Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Go, Rust, Java, C, C++, C#, Ruby, Swift, Dart, Elixir, Clojure, Lua, R, OCaml, Solidity, Elm, Gleam 등 30+ 언어

PageRank 기반 코드 관련성 순위

# repomap.py - get_ranked_tags()
def get_ranked_tags(self, chat_fnames, other_fnames, mentioned_fnames, mentioned_idents):
    import networkx as nx

    G = nx.MultiDiGraph()
    personalize = 100 / len(fnames)

    # 가중치 계산 - 다중 휴리스틱
    for ident in idents:
        mul = 1.0
        if ident in mentioned_idents:    mul *= 10    # 대화에서 언급된 식별자
        is_snake = ("_" in ident)                      # snake_case
        is_camel = any(c.isupper() for c in ident)     # camelCase
        if (is_snake or is_camel) and len(ident) >= 8:
            mul *= 10                                   # 긴 의미있는 이름
        if ident.startswith("_"):  mul *= 0.1           # 프라이빗
        if len(defines[ident]) > 5: mul *= 0.1          # 너무 많은 정의 = 일반적

        for referencer, num_refs in Counter(references[ident]).items():
            for definer in definers:
                use_mul = mul
                if referencer in chat_rel_fnames:
                    use_mul *= 50  # 대화 중인 파일에서의 참조 = 매우 중요
                num_refs = math.sqrt(num_refs)  # 빈도 스케일 다운
                G.add_edge(referencer, definer, weight=use_mul * num_refs)

    # PageRank 실행
    ranked = nx.pagerank(G, weight="weight", personalization=personalization)

핵심 가중치 전략:

조건 가중치 승수
대화에서 언급된 식별자 x10
snake_case/camelCase (8+ 문자) x10
채팅 중인 파일에서 참조 x50
프라이빗 식별자 (_접두) x0.1
5곳 이상 정의된 일반 식별자 x0.1

토큰 예산 내 이진 탐색

# repomap.py - get_ranked_tags_map_uncached()
# 순위화된 태그를 이진 탐색으로 토큰 예산에 맞춤
middle = min(int(max_map_tokens // 25), num_tags)
while lower_bound <= upper_bound:
    tree = self.to_tree(ranked_tags[:middle], chat_rel_fnames)
    num_tokens = self.token_count(tree)
    pct_err = abs(num_tokens - max_map_tokens) / max_map_tokens
    if pct_err < 0.15:  # 15% 오차 허용
        break
    if num_tokens < max_map_tokens:
        lower_bound = middle + 1
    else:
        upper_bound = middle - 1
    middle = int((lower_bound + upper_bound) // 2)

캐시 전략

  • SQLite 기반 디스크 캐시 (diskcache.Cache): .aider.tags.cache.v4/ 디렉토리
  • 파일 mtime 기반 무효화: 파일 수정 시간이 변경되면 태그 재생성
  • 맵 레벨 캐시: map_cache 딕셔너리로 동일 파라미터 재계산 방지
  • 리프레시 모드: auto(1초 이상 시 캐시), always, files, manual

1.4 .aiderignore 시스템

# repo.py - pathspec 기반 gitignore 호환 패턴 매칭
def refresh_aider_ignore(self):
    if not self.aider_ignore_file:
        return
    # 1초 미만 간격 체크 방지 (성능)
    current_time = time.time()
    if current_time - self.aider_ignore_last_check < 1:
        return
    # mtime 기반 변경 감지
    mtime = self.aider_ignore_file.stat().st_mtime
    if mtime != self.aider_ignore_ts:
        self.aider_ignore_ts = mtime
        self.ignore_file_cache = {}
        lines = self.aider_ignore_file.read_text().splitlines()
        self.aider_ignore_spec = pathspec.PathSpec.from_lines(
            pathspec.patterns.GitWildMatchPattern, lines)

2. 모델 라우팅 / 프로바이더 추상화

2.1 아키텍처

graph TD
    A[사용자 모델 지정] --> B{별칭 해석}
    B -->|"sonnet"| C["claude-sonnet-4-5"]
    B -->|"deepseek"| D["deepseek/deepseek-chat"]
    B -->|직접 지정| E[모델 이름]

    C --> F[ModelSettings 매칭]
    D --> F
    E --> F

    F --> G{정확 매칭?}
    G -->|Yes| H[YAML 설정 로드]
    G -->|No| I[제네릭 패턴 매칭]

    H --> J[Model 인스턴스]
    I --> J

    J --> K[weak_model 설정]
    J --> L[editor_model 설정]
    J --> M[edit_format 결정]

    N[LazyLiteLLM] --> O[litellm.completion]
    J --> O

2.2 LazyLiteLLM - 지연 로딩

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/llm.py

# llm.py - litellm import가 1.5초 걸리므로 지연 로딩
class LazyLiteLLM:
    _lazy_module = None

    def __getattr__(self, name):
        if name == "_lazy_module":
            return super()
        self._load_litellm()
        return getattr(self._lazy_module, name)

    def _load_litellm(self):
        if self._lazy_module is not None:
            return
        self._lazy_module = importlib.import_module("litellm")
        self._lazy_module.suppress_debug_info = True
        self._lazy_module.set_verbose = False
        self._lazy_module.drop_params = True

2.3 모델 별칭 시스템

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/models.py

MODEL_ALIASES = {
    "sonnet": "claude-sonnet-4-5",
    "haiku": "claude-haiku-4-5",
    "opus": "claude-opus-4-6",
    "4o": "gpt-4o",
    "deepseek": "deepseek/deepseek-chat",
    "flash": "gemini/gemini-flash-latest",
    "gemini": "gemini/gemini-3-pro-preview",
    "r1": "deepseek/deepseek-reasoner",
    "grok3": "xai/grok-3-beta",
    "optimus": "openrouter/openrouter/optimus-alpha",
}

2.4 ModelSettings 데이터클래스

@dataclass
class ModelSettings:
    name: str
    edit_format: str = "whole"           # 편집 전략
    weak_model_name: Optional[str] = None  # 가벼운 작업용 모델
    use_repo_map: bool = False             # 코드 맵 사용 여부
    send_undo_reply: bool = False
    lazy: bool = False                     # "게으름" 경고
    overeager: bool = False                # "과잉 편집" 경고
    reminder: str = "user"                 # 리마인더 위치
    examples_as_sys_msg: bool = False      # 예제를 시스템 메시지로
    cache_control: bool = False            # 프롬프트 캐싱
    streaming: bool = True
    editor_model_name: Optional[str] = None  # architect용 에디터
    editor_edit_format: Optional[str] = None
    reasoning_tag: Optional[str] = None      # thinking 태그
    system_prompt_prefix: Optional[str] = None
    accepts_settings: Optional[list] = None  # thinking_tokens, reasoning_effort

YAML 설정: 110_aider/110_aider/resources/model-settings.yml (2,955줄) - 수백 개 모델의 개별 설정

2.5 3-모델 아키텍처

역할 설명 예시
main_model 핵심 코딩 모델 claude-sonnet-4-5
weak_model 커밋 메시지, 채팅 요약 gpt-4o-mini
editor_model Architect 모드 편집 실행 별도 지정 또는 main_model

2.6 제네릭 모델 패턴 매칭

apply_generic_model_settings()는 모델 이름의 패턴으로 설정을 자동 적용:

def apply_generic_model_settings(self, model):
    if "/o3-mini" in model:
        self.edit_format = "diff"
        self.use_repo_map = True
        self.use_temperature = False
    elif "deepseek" in model and ("r1" in model or "reasoning" in model):
        self.edit_format = "diff"
        self.reasoning_tag = "think"
    elif "qwen3" in model and "235b" in model:
        self.edit_format = "diff"
        self.system_prompt_prefix = "/no_think"
        self.use_temperature = 0.7
        self.extra_params = {"top_p": 0.8, "top_k": 20}

2.7 ModelInfoManager - 다중 소스 모델 정보

graph LR
    A[모델 정보 요청] --> B{로컬 메타데이터?}
    B -->|Yes| C[반환]
    B -->|No| D{LiteLLM JSON 캐시?}
    D -->|Yes| E[반환]
    D -->|No| F{LiteLLM 라이브러리?}
    F -->|Yes| G[반환]
    F -->|No| H{OpenRouter 캐시?}
    H -->|Yes| I[반환]
    H -->|No| J[OpenRouter 웹 스크래핑]

3. 에러 처리 / 복구 패턴

3.1 LiteLLM 예외 분류 체계

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/exceptions.py

EXCEPTIONS = [
    ExInfo("APIConnectionError", retry=True, description=None),
    ExInfo("AuthenticationError", retry=False,
           description="The API provider is not able to authenticate you."),
    ExInfo("BadGatewayError", retry=True,
           description="The API provider's servers are down or overloaded."),
    ExInfo("ContextWindowExceededError", retry=False, description=None),  # 특수 처리
    ExInfo("RateLimitError", retry=True,
           description="The API provider has rate limited you."),
    ExInfo("Timeout", retry=True,
           description="The API provider timed out."),
    # ... 총 20+ 예외 유형
]

특수 케이스 처리:

def get_ex_info(self, ex):
    # boto3 미설치 시 명확한 안내
    if ex.__class__ is litellm.APIConnectionError:
        if "boto3" in str(ex):
            return ExInfo("APIConnectionError", False, "You need to: pip install boto3")
    # 크레딧 부족 시 재시도 안 함
    if ex.__class__ is litellm.APIError:
        if "insufficient credits" in str(ex).lower() and '"code":402' in str(ex).lower():
            return ExInfo("APIError", False, "Insufficient credits.")

3.2 지수 백오프 재시도

# base_coder.py - send_message() 내부
retry_delay = 0.125

while True:
    try:
        yield from self.send(messages, functions=self.functions)
        break
    except litellm_ex.exceptions_tuple() as err:
        ex_info = litellm_ex.get_ex_info(err)

        if ex_info.name == "ContextWindowExceededError":
            exhausted = True  # 특수 처리: 컨텍스트 축소 시도
            break

        should_retry = ex_info.retry
        if should_retry:
            retry_delay *= 2  # 지수 백오프
            if retry_delay > RETRY_TIMEOUT:  # 60초 타임아웃
                should_retry = False

        if not should_retry:
            self.check_and_open_urls(err, ex_info.description)
            break

        self.io.tool_output(f"Retrying in {retry_delay:.1f} seconds...")
        time.sleep(retry_delay)

3.3 FinishReasonLength 처리 (Infinite Output)

except FinishReasonLength:
    # 출력 제한 도달 시, assistant_prefill 지원 모델은 계속 생성
    if not self.main_model.info.get("supports_assistant_prefill"):
        exhausted = True
        break

    self.multi_response_content = self.get_multi_response_content_in_progress()
    # 이전 응답을 assistant 메시지로 추가하여 이어서 생성
    messages.append(
        dict(role="assistant", content=self.multi_response_content, prefix=True)
    )

3.4 파일 쓰기 재시도

# io.py - 에디터 파일 락 대응
def write_text(self, filename, content):
    # 파일이 잠겨있을 때 progressive backoff로 재시도
    delay = 0.1
    while True:
        try:
            # 쓰기 시도
            ...
        except OSError:
            delay *= 2  # Exponential backoff

3.5 Git 에러 방어

ANY_GIT_ERROR = [
    git.exc.ODBError, git.exc.GitError,
    git.exc.InvalidGitRepositoryError, git.exc.GitCommandNotFound,
    OSError, IndexError, BufferError, TypeError,
    ValueError, AttributeError, AssertionError, TimeoutError,
]
# 모든 Git 작업이 이 튜플로 감싸져 graceful degradation

4. 텔레메트리 / 관측성

4.1 Analytics 시스템

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/analytics.py

graph TD
    A[Analytics] --> B[PostHog]
    A --> C[Mixpanel - 비활성]
    A --> D[로컬 로그파일]

    E[UUID 기반 사용자 ID] --> A
    F[~/.aider/analytics.json] --> E

    G[옵트인 시스템] --> A
    G --> H{UUID 공간의 10% 내?}
    H -->|Yes| I[옵트인 질문]
    H -->|No| J[자동 비활성]

핵심 특징:

  • UUID 기반 샘플링: 전체 사용자 중 10%에게만 옵트인 질문 (is_uuid_in_percentage)
  • 모델명 리다팅: 알려지지 않은 모델은 provider/REDACTED로 변환
  • 시스템 정보 수집: Python 버전, OS, aider 버전 (super_properties)
  • 영구 비활성화 지원: permanently_disable 플래그
def event(self, event_name, main_model=None, **kwargs):
    properties = {}
    if main_model:
        properties["main_model"] = self._redact_model_name(main_model)
        properties["weak_model"] = self._redact_model_name(main_model.weak_model)
        properties["editor_model"] = self._redact_model_name(main_model.editor_model)

    if self.ph:  # PostHog
        self.ph.capture(event_name, distinct_id=self.user_id, properties=properties)

    if self.logfile:  # 로컬 로그
        log_entry = {"event": event_name, "properties": properties,
                     "user_id": self.user_id, "time": int(time.time())}
        with open(self.logfile, "a") as f:
            json.dump(log_entry, f)

4.2 추적되는 이벤트

  • message_send_starting - LLM 호출 시작
  • message_send_exception - 에러 발생
  • auto_model_selection - 자동 모델 선택
  • oauth_flow_initiated/success/failure - OAuth 흐름

5. IDE 통합

5.1 파일 워처 (watch.py)

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/watch.py

watchfiles 라이브러리를 사용하여 파일 변경을 실시간 감지하고, AI 코멘트(# AI: 등)가 포함된 변경을 자동으로 처리한다.

# watch.py - .gitignore 호환 패턴 무시
patterns = [
    ".aider*", ".git", "*~", "*.bak", "*.swp", "*.swo",
    "\\#*\\#", ".#*",  # Emacs auto-save/lock
    ".idea/", ".vscode/", "*.sublime-*",  # IDE 파일
    ".env", ".venv/", "node_modules/",    # 환경 파일
]

5.2 GUI (Streamlit)

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/gui.py

Streamlit 기반 웹 GUI 제공. CaptureIO로 CLI 출력을 캡처하여 웹에 표시.

5.3 에디터 통합

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/editor.py

$EDITOR 환경변수를 통한 외부 에디터 통합. vim, emacs, VS Code 등에서 편집 후 AI에게 전달 가능.

5.4 클립보드 통합

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/copypaste.py

--copy-paste 모드로 클립보드를 통한 자동 컨텍스트 전달 지원.

6. 패키징 / 배포

6.1 pyproject.toml 기반 패키징

파일 경로: 110_aider/pyproject.toml

[project]
name = "aider-chat"
requires-python = ">=3.10,<3.15"

[project.scripts]
aider = "aider.main:main"

[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=68", "setuptools_scm[toml]>=8"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[tool.setuptools_scm]
write_to = "aider/_version.py"  # Git 태그에서 자동 버전 추출

6.2 선택적 의존성

[tool.setuptools.dynamic.optional-dependencies]
dev = { file = "requirements/requirements-dev.txt" }
help = { file = "requirements/requirements-help.txt" }
browser = { file = "requirements/requirements-browser.txt" }
playwright = { file = "requirements/requirements-playwright.txt" }

6.3 설치 방법

  • pip install aider-chat (기본)
  • pip install aider-chat[help] (RAG 도움말 포함)
  • pip install aider-chat[browser] (웹 스크래핑 포함)
  • pip install aider-chat[playwright] (Playwright 브라우저 포함)

7. 테스트 인프라

7.1 테스트 구조

tests/basic/
├── test_analytics.py         # 텔레메트리 테스트

7.2 벤치마크 스위트

벤치마크 디렉토리: 110_aider/benchmark/

# benchmark/benchmark.py - Exercism 기반 polyglot 벤치마크
BENCHMARK_DNAME = Path(os.environ.get("AIDER_BENCHMARK_DIR", "tmp.benchmarks"))
EXERCISES_DIR_DEFAULT = "polyglot-benchmark"

# Docker 기반 격리 실행 지원
# SWE-Bench 통합 (swe-bench.txt, swe-bench-lite.txt)
# 시간별 성능 추적 (over_time.py)
# 리팩토링 벤치마크 (refactor_tools.py)

벤치마크는 다중 프로그래밍 언어에 걸쳐 모델별 편집 전략의 성공률을 측정한다.

8. 인증 / API 키 관리

8.1 자동 모델 선택 (API 키 기반)

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/onboarding.py

def try_to_select_default_model():
    # 우선순위 기반 자동 선택
    model_key_pairs = [
        ("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "sonnet"),
        ("DEEPSEEK_API_KEY", "deepseek"),
        ("OPENAI_API_KEY", "gpt-4o"),
        ("GEMINI_API_KEY", "gemini/gemini-2.5-pro-exp-03-25"),
        ("VERTEXAI_PROJECT", "vertex_ai/gemini-2.5-pro-exp-03-25"),
    ]
    for env_key, model_name in model_key_pairs:
        if os.environ.get(env_key):
            return model_name

8.2 OpenRouter OAuth 플로우 (PKCE)

# onboarding.py - 브라우저 기반 OAuth
def generate_pkce_codes():
    code_verifier = secrets.token_urlsafe(64)
    hasher = hashlib.sha256()
    hasher.update(code_verifier.encode("utf-8"))
    code_challenge = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(hasher.digest()).rstrip(b"=").decode("utf-8")
    return code_verifier, code_challenge

def exchange_code_for_key(code, code_verifier, io):
    response = requests.post(
        "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/auth/keys",
        json={"code": code, "code_verifier": code_verifier,
              "code_challenge_method": "S256"},
        timeout=30)
    return response.json().get("key")

8.3 OpenRouter 티어 감지

def check_openrouter_tier(api_key):
    """무료/유료 티어에 따라 다른 기본 모델 선택"""
    response = requests.get("https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/auth/key",
                           headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {api_key}"})
    is_free_tier = response.json().get("data", {}).get("is_free_tier", True)
    # 무료: deepseek-r1:free, 유료: claude-sonnet-4

8.4 키 저장 방식

  • 환경변수 (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY 등)
  • .env 파일 (dotenv 로드)
  • OAuth로 획득한 키는 환경변수에 설정

9. 음성 / 멀티모달

9.1 음성 입력 (voice.py)

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/voice.py

graph LR
    A[마이크 입력] -->|sounddevice| B[WAV 녹음]
    B --> C{파일 크기 > 24.9MB?}
    C -->|Yes| D[MP3 변환]
    C -->|No| E[WAV 유지]
    D --> F[Whisper API]
    E --> F
    F --> G[텍스트 출력]
    G --> H[Aider 프롬프트에 입력]

class Voice:
    threshold = 0.15  # 볼륨 감지 임계값

    def record_and_transcribe(self, history=None, language=None):
        # sounddevice로 실시간 녹음
        with self.sd.InputStream(samplerate=sample_rate, channels=1,
                                  callback=self.callback, device=self.device_id):
            prompt(self.get_prompt, refresh_interval=0.1)  # 실시간 볼륨 바 표시

        # Whisper로 전사
        transcript = litellm.transcription(
            model="whisper-1", file=fh,
            prompt=history,    # 이전 대화 컨텍스트
            language=language  # 언어 힌트
        )

특징:

  • 실시간 볼륨 바: get_prompt()로 Recording... 3.2sec ░░░█████████ 형태 표시
  • 자동 포맷 변환: 24.9MB 초과 시 자동 MP3 변환
  • 장치 선택: --voice-input-device 옵션으로 특정 마이크 지정
  • 다국어 지원: language 파라미터로 전사 언어 힌트

9.2 이미지/PDF 지원

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/coders/base_coder.py (라인 817-857)

def get_images_message(self, fnames):
    supports_images = self.main_model.info.get("supports_vision")
    supports_pdfs = self.main_model.info.get("supports_pdf_input")

    for fname in fnames:
        mime_type, _ = mimetypes.guess_type(fname)
        with open(fname, "rb") as image_file:
            encoded_string = base64.b64encode(image_file.read()).decode("utf-8")

        if mime_type.startswith("image/") and supports_images:
            image_messages += [
                {"type": "text", "text": f"Image file: {rel_fname}"},
                {"type": "image_url", "image_url": {"url": image_url, "detail": "high"}},
            ]
        elif mime_type == "application/pdf" and supports_pdfs:
            image_messages += [
                {"type": "text", "text": f"PDF file: {rel_fname}"},
                {"type": "image_url", "image_url": image_url},
            ]

10. Coder 전략 다양성 (핵심 강점)

10.1 전체 Coder 계층 구조

디렉토리: 110_aider/110_aider/coders/

graph TD
    A[Coder - base_coder.py] --> B[AskCoder]
    A --> C[EditBlockCoder]
    A --> D[WholeFileCoder]
    A --> E[UnifiedDiffCoder]
    A --> F[UnifiedDiffSimpleCoder]
    A --> G[PatchCoder]
    A --> H[HelpCoder]
    A --> I[ContextCoder]

    B --> J[ArchitectCoder]

    C --> K[EditBlockFencedCoder]
    C --> L[EditorEditBlockCoder]

    D --> M[EditorWholeFileCoder]

    N[EditorDiffFencedCoder] --> A

    style A fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style J fill:#bbf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:3px
    style C fill:#bfb,stroke:#333,stroke-width:3px

10.2 편집 전략별 비교

전략 edit_format 설명 주 사용 모델
EditBlock diff SEARCH/REPLACE 블록 Claude, GPT-4o
EditBlockFenced diff-fenced 펜스 태그 SEARCH/REPLACE -
WholeFile whole 전체 파일 출력 GPT-3.5, 소형 모델
UnifiedDiff udiff 유니파이드 diff 형식 GPT-4-turbo
UnifiedDiffSimple udiff-simple 간소화된 udiff -
Patch patch 구조적 패치 형식 -
Architect architect 2단계: 설계 + 편집 Claude Sonnet+Editor
EditorEditBlock editor-diff 편집 전용 EditBlock Architect의 editor
EditorWholeFile editor-whole 편집 전용 WholeFile -
EditorDiffFenced editor-diff-fenced 편집 전용 Fenced -
Ask ask 질문 전용 (편집 안 함) 모든 모델
Help help 도움말 검색 -
Context context 파일 선택만 수행 -

10.3 EditBlock 전략 (가장 널리 사용)

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/coders/editblock_coder.py

class EditBlockCoder(Coder):
    edit_format = "diff"

    def apply_edits(self, edits, dry_run=False):
        for path, original, updated in edits:
            full_path = self.abs_root_path(path)
            content = self.io.read_text(full_path)
            new_content = do_replace(full_path, content, original, updated, self.fence)

            # 실패 시 다른 채팅 파일에서 매칭 시도
            if not new_content and original.strip():
                for full_path in self.abs_fnames:
                    content = self.io.read_text(full_path)
                    new_content = do_replace(full_path, content, original, updated, self.fence)
                    if new_content:
                        path = self.get_rel_fname(full_path)
                        break

10.4 SearchReplace - 퍼지 매칭 엔진

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/coders/search_replace.py

RelativeIndenter 클래스가 핵심: 들여쓰기 차이를 정규화하여 들여쓰기가 다른 코드 블록도 매칭 가능하게 만든다.

# 원본:
        Foo
            Bar
            Baz

# RelativeIndenter 변환:
        Foo
    Bar       # 이전 줄 대비 +4 들여쓰기
Baz           # 이전 줄과 동일

10.5 Patch 전략 (구조적 패치)

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/coders/patch_coder.py

class ActionType(str, Enum):
    ADD = "Add"
    DELETE = "Delete"
    UPDATE = "Update"

@dataclass
class PatchAction:
    type: ActionType
    path: str
    new_content: Optional[str] = None  # ADD용
    chunks: List[Chunk] = ...          # UPDATE용
    move_path: Optional[str] = None    # 파일 이동

# 3단계 퍼지 매칭
def find_context_core(lines, context, start):
    # 1. 정확 매칭 (fuzz=0)
    # 2. rstrip 매칭 (fuzz=1) - 후행 공백 무시
    # 3. strip 매칭 (fuzz=100) - 모든 공백 무시

10.6 Architect 전략 (2단계 파이프라인)

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/coders/architect_coder.py

class ArchitectCoder(AskCoder):
    edit_format = "architect"

    def reply_completed(self):
        content = self.partial_response_content

        # 1단계: 설계 모델이 변경 사항 기술
        if not self.auto_accept_architect and not self.io.confirm_ask("Edit the files?"):
            return

        # 2단계: 에디터 모델이 실제 편집 수행
        editor_model = self.main_model.editor_model or self.main_model
        kwargs = {
            "main_model": editor_model,
            "edit_format": self.main_model.editor_edit_format,
            "suggest_shell_commands": False,
            "map_tokens": 0,
            "cache_prompts": False,
        }

        editor_coder = Coder.create(io=self.io, from_coder=self, **kwargs)
        editor_coder.run(with_message=content, preproc=False)

Architect 워크플로우:

사용자 요청 → [Architect 모델: 자연어 변경 기술] → 사용자 확인 →
[Editor 모델: 실제 코드 편집] → 자동 커밋

10.7 Context Coder (파일 선택 전용)

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/coders/context_coder.py

class ContextCoder(Coder):
    """파일 편집 없이, 어떤 파일이 편집 대상인지만 식별"""
    edit_format = "context"

    def reply_completed(self):
        # LLM이 언급한 파일과 현재 파일 비교
        current_rel_fnames = set(self.get_inchat_relative_files())
        mentioned_rel_fnames = set(self.get_file_mentions(content))

        if mentioned_rel_fnames == current_rel_fnames:
            return True  # 일치하면 완료

        # 일치하지 않으면 파일 교체 후 재시도
        self.abs_fnames = set()
        for fname in mentioned_rel_fnames:
            self.add_rel_fname(fname)
        self.reflected_message = self.gpt_prompts.try_again

10.8 Reflection 패턴 (자동 수정 루프)

# base_coder.py - 최대 3회 반복
max_reflections = 3

# 편집 적용 후:
# 1. Lint 에러 → reflected_message로 재시도
# 2. 테스트 에러 → reflected_message로 재시도
# 3. 편집 실패 → 에러 메시지를 LLM에 피드백

11. Linting / Auto-fix

11.1 Linter 클래스

파일 경로: 110_aider/110_aider/linter.py

graph TD
    A[편집 완료] --> B{auto_lint 활성?}
    B -->|Yes| C[변경된 파일 lint]
    C --> D{Python?}
    D -->|Yes| E[basic_lint + compile + flake8]
    D -->|No| F{커스텀 명령?}
    F -->|Yes| G[사용자 lint 명령 실행]
    F -->|No| H[Tree-sitter 기본 lint]

    E --> I{에러?}
    G --> I
    H --> I
    I -->|Yes| J[사용자에게 수정 제안]
    J -->|수락| K[LLM에 에러 전달하여 재시도]
    I -->|No| L[자동 커밋]

11.2 Python 전용 3단계 린팅

def py_lint(self, fname, rel_fname, code):
    basic_res = basic_lint(rel_fname, code)       # Tree-sitter 기본 검사
    compile_res = lint_python_compile(fname, code) # compile() 구문 검사
    flake_res = self.flake8_lint(rel_fname)        # flake8 치명적 에러만
    # E9, F821, F823, F831, F406, F407, F701, F702, F704, F706

11.3 자동 수정 루프

# base_coder.py - send_message 후 처리
if edited and self.auto_lint:
    lint_errors = self.lint_edited(edited)
    self.auto_commit(edited, context="Ran the linter")
    self.lint_outcome = not lint_errors
    if lint_errors:
        ok = self.io.confirm_ask("Attempt to fix lint errors?")
        if ok:
            self.reflected_message = lint_errors  # LLM에 피드백
            return  # 재시도 루프로

if edited and self.auto_test:
    test_errors = self.commands.cmd_test(self.test_cmd)
    self.test_outcome = not test_errors
    if test_errors:
        ok = self.io.confirm_ask("Attempt to fix test errors?")
        if ok:
            self.reflected_message = test_errors
            return

12. 국제화 / 접근성

12.1 다국어 지원 (사용자 언어 감지)

# base_coder.py - Babel 라이브러리로 로케일 감지
try:
    from babel import Locale
except ImportError:
    Locale = None

def get_user_language(self):
    # 시스템 로케일에서 언어 추출
    # 예: en_US → English, ko_KR → Korean

12.2 LLM 응답 언어 설정

# base_coder.py - fmt_system_prompt()
if user_lang:
    final_reminders.append(f"Reply in {user_lang}.\n")

12.3 커밋 메시지 언어 설정

# repo.py - get_commit_message()
if user_language:
    language_instruction = f"\n- Is written in {user_language}."

12.4 chat_language / commit_language 분리

# base_coder.__init__()
self.chat_language = chat_language    # 채팅 응답 언어
self.commit_language = commit_language # 커밋 메시지 언어

12.5 접근성

  • 실시간 볼륨 바: 시각적 녹음 피드백 (░░░█████████)
  • 컬러/비컬러 모드: --no-pretty, --dark-mode, --light-mode
  • 멀티라인 모드: Alt-Enter 서밋, Enter 개행
  • 음성 입력: 타이핑 불편 사용자를 위한 대안
